Title: B6. Binary Representation Minimization

Question:

Find the minimum k(n).

Node started: Determine if there exists an integer n such that 2023*n is a power of 2. If not, explain why based on the prime factorization of 2023. This corresponds to checking if k(n)=1 is possible.

Node started: Test if k(n)=2 is possible by checking if 2023 divides 2^a + 2^b for some non-negative integers a and b (where a != b). If k(n)=2 is impossible, investigate if k(n)=3 is possible by checking if 2023 divides 2^a + 2^b + 2^c for some distinct non-negative integers a, b, and c.
